data.name: Lust Mansion 🔞
data.detailed_description:
Welcome to Lust Mansion🔞, a visual novel for adults that immerses you in the mysterious world of the post-war period of the 1950s. You take control of the protagonist, Peter, who returns to his adopted grandfather's old mansion, which has been deserted since his passing.

Peter, a veteran of the British army and a scout trainer, is determined to uncover the circumstances surrounding his grandfather's death, who appeared to have many years left to live. Was it a natural demise, or is there something darker and more mysterious lurking beneath the surface?

Meanwhile, Peter strives to carve out a life for himself and perhaps profit from his grandfather's inheritance. However, as he delves deeper into the enigmatic events of the mansion, he realizes that his personal aspirations may pale in comparison to the quest for truth.

Experience erotic encounters, tangled conspiracies, and intricate relationships in Lust Mansion🔞. This game is replete with suspense, mystery, and intrigue, sure to captivate any enthusiast of adult visual novels. Embark on the journey to unravel the secrets of Lust Mansion🔞 and embrace the role of a true detective of your era.

Features:
  • Emotional and immersive graphical storyline: Immerse yourself in the captivating plot of "Lust Mansion", which grabs and holds your attention with every twist and turn.

  • Variety of sexual scenes: Explore a wide range of erotic situations that inspire and reflect the diversity of your fantasies.

  • Mini-games with unique tasks: Take a break from the main storyline and test your skills in various engaging mini-games.

  • Real-time 3D characters and animation: Enjoy realistic visual effects and dynamic animation in real-time.

  • Wild adventures with different girls: Gain access to numerous explicit scenes with diverse characters featured in the game.

  • One-handed gameplay convenience: Enjoy playing "Lust Mansion" even when you only have one hand available. ( ͡~ ͜ʖ ͡°)

data.supported_languages:
英文*, 俄文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 阿拉伯文, 保加利亞文, 捷克文, 丹麥文, 荷蘭文, 芬蘭文, 希臘文, 匈牙利文, 印尼語, 日文, 韓文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 羅馬尼亞文, 簡體中文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 瑞典文, 泰文, 繁體中文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 越南文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or above
  • 處理器: Intel or AMD
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Direct X compatible
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
